steps.name: Navigate to '/' endpoint
Login to the site as 'System admin' with '0820.201930.25.super@email.com'
Enter the user's email in the 'Email' field
Enter the user's password in the 'Password' field
Press 'Login' button

steps.name: Click on 'System administration' in the Header
Click 'Acquirers' tab
Select 'Rows per page' '10'
Click the 'Rows per page' dropdown Chevron
Click pagination page button #1
Verify headers on page '1' with '10' pagination
Select 'Rows per page' '25'
Click the 'Rows per page' dropdown Chevron
Click pagination page button #1
Verify headers on page '1' with '25' pagination
Select 'Rows per page' '50'
Click the 'Rows per page' dropdown Chevron
Click pagination page button #1
Verify headers on page '1' with '50' pagination
Select 'Rows per page' '100'
Click the 'Rows per page' dropdown Chevron
Click pagination page button #1
Verify headers on page '1' with '100' pagination
